title: gazania krebsiana subsp. arctotoides
intro: Gazania krebsiana subsp. arctotoides, also known as the Arctotis, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gazania krebsiana subsp. arctotoides include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Gazania krebsiana subsp. arctotoides can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
